summary: Tested 3 critical bug fixes: 1) Commission save endpoint (POST /api/profit/commission) works with commission_date field - no longer returns 500. 2) Batch Sync to Rewards Platform button works - calls rewardsAPI.adminSyncAllUsers() correctly. 3) Platform Settings page loads without black screen - dead useEffect was removed. All backend tests passed (6/6), frontend verification completed.

issues: DialogContent console warning about missing Description for screen reader accessibility - non-blocking cosmetic issue
Console warning about chart width/height being -1 on initial render - non-blocking cosmetic issue

seed_data_creation: Created test commission records during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three bugs fixed and verified: 1) CommissionCreate Pydantic model now includes traders_count and commission_date fields. 2) DiagnosticsTab now uses rewardsAPI.adminSyncAllUsers() instead of undefined batchSync(). 3) AdminSettingsPage useEffect that called undefined setLastSyncDate/setNextSyncRecommended was removed. Auto batch sync every 4 hours is configured in server.py scheduler.

commission_endpoint_fix.POST_commission_without_date: PASS - Defaults to today's date when commission_date not provided
commission_endpoint_fix.GET_commissions: PASS - Returns list of saved commissions

rewards_batch_sync_fix.auto_sync_scheduler: VERIFIED - Configured in server.py lines 377-394 (every 4 hours)
